phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso per la Torre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so per la TOR-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the base of the Asinelli tower.

responses.english: At the base of the Asinelli tower.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è necessaria la prenotazione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh neh-ches-SAH-ree-ah lah preh-noh-tat-TSYOH-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa salire sulla torre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah sah-LEE-reh SOOL-la TOR-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiude oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si possono fare foto qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see POHSS-oh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh KOO-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, without flash it is allowed.

responses.english: Yes, without flash it is allowed.
